textByHashes.a2c7369286def5774548897b2322d3eba9f06225: Welcome! I'm Ali, and this is my tea shop! Is there anything I can do for you today?
textByHashes.759643eaf668b4ff8fc4188397eeb8bd899c309c: Of course! I'll get the water boiling at once. Is there anything else I can do for you while you wait?
textByHashes.e8ce2d99131801a5108c671290871d2e9fbff0da: Oh! Yes, the water is boiling. Just give me a minute!
textByHashes.6af8ae1581ce3acc671b206f9d0ffdfd45c3bd7f: I know, the desert is forever hot. Thirsty work here!
textByHashes.5e521fcf19b497a8c72aebf2c823694bc88b23c3: It's not that. It's just that I've been having issues with a few thieves lately. Four to be precise!
textByHashes.a81c19a20fb8858efc9f593e4910d9495962a394: There have been a few break-ins. A recent shipment from Karamja has been taken! That was some of the finest stuff I've ever managed to get my hands on.
textByHashes.dcbdd6f9dd1271c3377811e6d76abb6ee4531448: Ha! Very courageous, adventurer! These thieves are big and brutish. I wouldn't start something you may not be able to finish.
textByHashes.0b377dd954de50b01fc38ed0e54d3a8475ae8aff: You're leaving? But the tea is almost done!
textByHashes.04248dbd05d7098e3052e7dacd460d6c77917d34: Ah yes! I'll get the water boiling at once. Is there anything else I can do for you while you wait?
